description: Feature tracker — source of truth for what to build next. Mirror into harness.db with `scripts/bin/harness-cli feature sync`. Only one feature may be in_progress at a time.

features.title: List installed formulae & casks
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/packages returns installed formulae and casks with name, version, type, and outdated flag; supports ?type=formula|cask.
verification: Unit: service returns mapped packages from a mocked BrewClient.
Integration: adapter parses fixture `brew info --json=v2` output.
E2E: MockMvc GET /api/packages returns 200 with formulae and casks.
Platform (manual, controlled machine): real `brew list` smoke.
features.notes: Depends on the BrewClient port from decision 0001.

features.title: Detect outdated packages
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/packages/outdated returns name, current, latest, type, pinned; empty array when nothing is outdated.

features.title: List running brew services
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/services returns each service with name and status (started|stopped|error|unknown).

features.title: Show package info / dependencies
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/packages/{name} returns info and dependency list; 404 when not installed.
verification: Integration: adapter against fixture output including casks.
features.notes: Cask vs formula JSON shapes differ — known friction.

features.title: Upgrade a selected package (destructive)
features.user_visible_behavior: POST /api/packages/{name}/upgrade upgrades one named package; supports dryRun; never bulk-upgrades implicitly; 404 if not installed, 409 if not outdated.
verification: Unit: service incl. dryRun with mocked BrewClient.
Integration: adapter command construction (no real exec).
Platform (manual, controlled machine ONLY): real `brew upgrade` smoke.
features.notes: High-risk: needs a dedicated decision record (dry-run/confirmation/timeouts) before implementation.
